description: Risk Adjustment Agent (RiskAdjustmentAgent) for the RiskAdjustment persona(s). Bound to PayerAnalytics semantic model (Direct Lake over lh_gold_curated) and the Payer_Ontology graph. Allowed gold tables: fact_raf_score, fact_claim, fact_member_month, dim_member, dim_hcc, dim_diagnosis, dim_provider, dim_date.
